responses: Padmashree College was established in 2007 AD at Tinkune, Kathmandu, Nepal. It is franchised with Nilai University, Malaysia and affiliated with Tribhuvan University (TU). The college offers BIT, BHM, BBA, BCA, and B.Tech Food Technology programs. With 10,000+ alumni worldwide, state-of-the-art labs, and industry-focused education, it is one of Nepal's top-ranked international institutions.

Padmashree International College (est. 2007) is Kathmandu's leading institution offering internationally recognized bachelor's programs. Located at Tinkune, it is known for quality education, experienced faculty, and a vibrant campus life.

responses:
Padmashree College offers 5 bachelor's programs:
1. BIT – Bachelor of Information Technology (Nilai University)
2. BHM – Bachelor of Hospitality Management (Nilai University)
3. BBA – Bachelor of Business Administration (Nilai University)
4. BCA – Bachelor of Computer Application (Tribhuvan University)
5. B.Tech Food Technology (Tribhuvan University)
Would you like details on any specific program?

patterns: do i need entrance for BIT

do i need entrance for BIT
responses:
BIT (Bachelor of Information Technology) at Padmashree:
• Affiliation: Nilai University, Malaysia
• Duration: 4 years, 9 semesters, 126 credit hours
• Eligibility: Grade XII / A-Level with minimum 45% in two subjects (any faculty)
• No entrance exam required!
• Key subjects: C-Programming, OOP, Database Systems, Computer Architecture, OS, Networking, AI, Blockchain, IoT, Big Data, Web Development
• Includes 6-credit internship + Capstone Final Year Project
• Develops soft skills: public speaking, critical thinking, professional development

Padmashree's BIT is affiliated with Nilai University, Malaysia — giving you an internationally recognized degree. It's a 4-year program covering software development, AI, blockchain, IoT, networking, and more. No entrance exam needed — just 45% in +2!

patterns: what subjects in BIT first year
what do i study in BIT first sem
BIT first year what to study
responses:
BIT Semester 1 subjects include:
• EC3105 – C-Programming (3 credits)
• EC3114 – Software Modelling and Analysis (3 credits)
• EC3119 – Database System (3 credits)
• EC3120 – Computer Architecture and Organization (3 credits)
• EC3121 – Introduction to OOP (3 credits)
• EC3123 – Operating System Principle (3 credits)
• EC3130 – Data Communication and Networking (3 credits)
Total: 21 credits in core computing courses.

BIT Semester 1 at Padmashree covers 7 core subjects: C-Programming, Software Modelling, Database System, Computer Architecture, OOP, Operating System, and Data Communication — totaling 21 credit hours.

BIT advanced subjects include:
• Artificial Intelligence
• Blockchain Technology
• Internet of Things (IoT)
• Big Data Analytics
• Dynamic Web Programming
• Software Design and Architecture
• Information Systems Management
• Capstone Final Year Project I & II (research-based)
• 6-credit Internship (final semester)
These cutting-edge subjects prepare you for the modern IT industry!

Many graduates are placed in Nepal's top IT companies like eSewa, F1Soft, Leapfrog, and also in companies abroad. Padmashree's co-op program with eSewa F1Soft International provides direct placement opportunities!
BIT graduates from Padmashree work at top companies including eSewa, F1Soft, InfoDevelopers, Leapfrog, and companies abroad. Many secure jobs even before graduation through the CO-OP program.

BCA (Bachelor of Computer Application) at Padmashree:
• Affiliation: Tribhuvan University (TU), Nepal

Padmashree's BCA is TU-affiliated — a trusted Nepali degree. It's a 4-year program developing skilled programmers and IT administrators. Minimum 40% marks in +2 required. Padmashree provides FREE BCA entrance preparation classes!

Padmashree holds annual graduation ceremonies at prestigious venues in Kathmandu. BIT and BHM graduates receive Nilai University degrees. B.Tech Food and BCA graduates receive TU degrees.

patterns: BIT vs BCA which is better
should i choose BIT or BCA
bro BIT ra BCA ma kun ramro
BIT or BCA for software job
BIT or BCA for nepal job
BIT or BCA which has better scope
responses:
BIT vs BCA at Padmashree:

BIT (Nilai University, Malaysia):
• International degree, globally recognized
• 126 credit hours, 9 semesters
• No entrance exam (45% in +2)
• Covers AI, Blockchain, IoT, Big Data
• Higher international recognition

BCA (Tribhuvan University, Nepal):
• TU degree, strong in Nepal
• 128 credit hours, 8 semesters
• TU entrance exam required (40% in +2)
• FREE entrance prep classes at Padmashree
• Stronger for government jobs in Nepal

Choose BIT for global career, BCA for Nepal-focused career!

responses:
BBA vs BHM at Padmashree (both Nilai University):

BBA (Business Administration):
• Focuses on business, management, marketing, finance
• Great for corporate, banking, entrepreneurship careers
• Broader career options across industries

BHM (Hospitality Management):
• Focuses on hotels, tourism, restaurants, events
• Great for hospitality industry in Nepal and abroad
• Excellent for those passionate about tourism/travel

Choose BBA for business/corporate career, BHM for hospitality/tourism!

BBA: business, finance, marketing, HR, entrepreneurship — ideal for corporate/banking careers. BHM: hotel ops, culinary, tourism, events — ideal for hospitality/travel globally. Both from Nilai University!
